expected_effect: Recover topology separation without the weak-slice collapse from the first structural pivot.
expected_failure_signature: The router cuts average fees into a hidden cheap mode and leaks arb or tail protection.
expected_win_condition: Keep the defensive floor while a bounded competitive branch recovers weak slices.
hidden_coupling_removed: One additive surface was simultaneously deciding the defensive floor and the competitive mode.
rationale: Retry the two-mode controller with a defensive default, firmer protective floor, and slower release so the cheap mode cannot dominate the whole surface.
title: Defensive router with bounded cheap mode
why_not_coefficient_retune: This changes quote assembly into a defensive default plus bounded competitive router rather than retuning one surface.
